hook_en: Tap fault lines to fracture an iceberg into chunks that exactly match buyer weight orders before your hammer pool runs out.
hook_ru: Колите ледник по разломам, чтобы получить куски нужного веса для покупателей, пока не кончились удары молота.
mechanic: Top-down Voronoi-tiled iceberg blob; click internal fault edges to split into chunks; drag chunks onto buyer order panel; deliveries must match target weight within tolerance.

design.non_timer_pressure: resource scarcity (12 hammer charges + chunk-drift loss)
design.lose_condition: hammers <= 0 with unfilled orders OR chunks_lost >= 2
design.win_condition: all orders filled within +-2 kg across 4 rounds
